rulings.Case Title: PETER GRIMES et al VS. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 27, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS THE BANK OF NEW YORK PSA CUSTODIAN, ALTERNATIVE LOAN TRUST 2007-OH2, AS THE PSA, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SUCESSOR BY MERGER TO, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege tender and to allege all elements of causes of action (1) cancellation of instruments; (2) B&P 17200; (3) declaratory relief; (4) wrongful foreclosure; and (5) quiet title. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CAIRO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. BANK OF THE WEST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 27, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST'S JOINDER TO DIVP'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing required as to causes of action 1st and 3rd to address ripeness of these claims at the time of bankruptcy filing. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th and 8th to allege in good faith that distributions made by receiver to DIVP were made towards the debt owed under the Deed of Trust/Note. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CAIRO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. BANK OF THE WEST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 27, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT DIVP HOSPITALITY VALLEJO, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing required as to causes of action 1st and 3rd to address ripeness of these claims at the time of bankruptcy filing. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes 2nd, 4th, 5th, 6th and 8th to allege in good faith that distributions made by receiver to DIVP were made towards the debt owed under the Deed of Trust/Note. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CAIRO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. BANK OF THE WEST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 27, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts showing CAIRO, LLC's standing and duty owed to CAIRO, LLC. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: WORKING DIRT LLC VS. ANNE RONCE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 27, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT ZOHEILA ZADFAR's HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Hearing Required. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. VS. PENINSULA OMEGA YOUTH CLUB DBA INNER CITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 27, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT ALPHA BUIE's Motion To Quash DENIED, 5 days to respond. Proof of Service by registered process server on file. = (501/HMD)
